title: System Application Engineer
description:
Description: System Application Engineer (Staff/Senior Staff )
   

  

 Location: Bengaluru , India
   

  

**About Us**
 We are a fast\\-growing Indian startup focused on developing innovative sensor\\-based systems for cutting\\-edge applications. We are very strong on materials, electrochemistry, physics, pure sciences and have deep engagement and understanding of our customer’s requirements. Competing against the other global behemoths, we have carved a niche for our Hydrogen Sensor product line in the international market with our patented technologies. Our mission is to push the boundaries of our technologies by creating high\\-performance Analog Front\\-End (AFE) data acquisition systems for sensors and impedance measurement solutions. While we are building a strong team to progress our cutting edge sensing technologies on a MEMS platform (close engagement with premier research institutions in India), we are now focussing on developing in\\-house electronics chip building capabilities. We’re looking for a passionate and self\\-driven System Application Leadto join our dynamic team and take ownership of critical design challenges. The Company has recently secured a healthy Seed Round of funding and has also been approved for the Design Linked Incentive scheme of MeitY, which shall fuel our next stage of growth.
   

  

**Role Overview**
 As a System Application Engineer (staff/senior staff) you will be the technical face of our next\\-generation Gas Sensing Solution employing our state of the art MEMS Sensor and Analog Front\\-End (AFE) chip family. You will take ownership in translating high\\-level customer problems into complete, production\\-ready reference designs. Drawing on deep mixed\\-signal expertise, you will create evaluation boards, application notes, design tools and in\\-field demos that accelerate customer design\\-in and showcase our Gas Sensor \\+ AFE SoC’s competitive edge. Your insights will directly shape product and silicon road\\-maps and go\\-to\\-market collateral
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Own the reference design strategy where you will define, architect and deliver PCB \\+ firmware reference designs that solve real customer use\\-cases for Gas Sensing Applications.
* Engage with end\\-customers to distil application requirements, performance gaps and emerging trends.
* Collateral creation – author application notes, user guides, BOMs, schematics, simulation models and embedded drivers
* Design, bring\\-up and validate evaluation boards; implement automated test scripts for performance verification
* Capture field learnings, benchmark competition, and feed quantitative data back to marketing \\& design
* Present at webinars, industry forums and author technical blogs to position our Gas Sensing Solution as the reference platform


**What We’re Looking For**
* B.Tech/M.Tech/Ph.D. in EE/ECE with 8\\+ years experience in system applications engineering for mixed\\-signal ICs and sensing solutions. with at least one end\\-to\\-end AFE, data\\-acquisition or sensor\\-interface product in volume production
* Proven track record creating reference designs/eval boards and associated collateral for tier\\-1 customers
* Expert knowledge of analog signal\\-chains (ADC/DAC, PGAs, low\\-noise amps, sensor excitation), embedded MCU/RISC\\-V or ARM subsystems, and precision power supplies
* Hands\\-on proficiency with PCB design, lab instrumentation, scripting (Python/LabVIEW), and C/C\\+\\+ firmware
* Strong customer\\-facing communication skills and ability to convey complex trade\\-offs to both executives and design engineers
* Experience in industrial or automotive sensor systems with strict EMC/EMI and safety compliance


**Nice To Have**
* Familiarity with IEC 61010, IEC 60079, ISO 13485 or IEC 61508, ISO 26262 functional\\-safety flows
* Knowledge of sensor technologies (e.g., MEMS, piezoelectric, or capacitive sensors).
* Digital signal processing (DSP) , AI/ML techniques for sensor data processing.


 Why Join Us?
   

  

* Lead the system\\-level vision for a Gas Sensing Solutions that will anchor multiple vertical platforms.
* Influence product and silicon road\\-maps while remaining deeply hands\\-on with hardware, firmware and real customer problems.
* Be a key player in an innovative Indian startup shaping the future of sensor technology.
* Competitive compensation, ESOP , and a vibrant work culture.

title: Artificial Intelligence Engineer
description:
About the Role
 



 We need a Junior AI Engineer who can do two things well: ship full stack web apps quickly using AI tools, and help maintain and improve our AI\\-powered automations, agents, and workflows.
 



 You don't need to architect complex RAG pipelines from scratch or build multi\\-agent systems on day one. But you should understand how these systems work, be comfortable maintaining and improving them, and be eager to grow into building them independently.
 



  





  





 What You'll Do
 



 \\- Build websites, MVPs, and product features fast using AI\\-assisted development — you'll often go from idea to working demo in a day
 



 \\- Help maintain and improve existing AI automations and agent workflows — monitor them, fix issues, and make incremental improvements
 



 \\- Assist in building and maintaining our RAG\\-based AI support chat — updating knowledge bases, testing accuracy, and improving responses
 



 \\- Set up and maintain automations using tools like n8n, Make, or Zapier to connect our internal tools and workflows
 



 \\- Integrate with SaaS tools our team uses — CRM, email, Slack/WhatsApp, ticketing, spreadsheets, and databases
 



 \\- Work alongside our senior engineers, learning how production AI systems work while contributing real, shippable code every day
 



  





  





 What We Need From You
 



 \\- Full stack web development skills — you can build a working web app from frontend to backend. React/Next.js, Node.js or Python, and a database (PostgreSQL or similar). Doesn't need to be 5 years of experience, but you should be able to ship a complete feature on your own
 



 \\- AI\\-powered development workflow — you use AI coding tools (Claude, Cursor, Copilot, or similar) daily and they genuinely make you faster. You can prototype an MVP in hours, not days
 



 \\- Basic understanding of LLMs and AI agents — you know what prompt engineering is, you understand how tool calling works, and you've at least experimented with building simple agents or automations using LLM APIs
 



 \\- Basic understanding of RAG — you know what embeddings, vector search, and chunking mean. You don't need to have built a production RAG system, but you should understand the concepts well enough to maintain and improve one
 



 \\- Python skills — you can write scripts, work with APIs and JSON, and build simple backend logic
 



 \\- Willingness to learn fast — you'll be working with production AI systems from day one. We'll teach you, but you need to pick things up quickly and not wait to be told what to do
 



  





  





 Nice\\-to\\-Haves
 



 \\- Experience with automation platforms (n8n, Make, Zapier)
 



 \\- Familiarity with LangChain, LlamaIndex, or similar frameworks
 



 \\- Basic knowledge of vector databases (FAISS, Qdrant, Pinecone, pgvector)
 



 \\- Experience with open\\-source LLMs (running local models, understanding tradeoffs vs. commercial APIs)
 



 \\- Docker basics and any cloud deployment experience (AWS/GCP)
 



 \\- MCP (Model Context Protocol) awareness
 



  





  





 You'll Do Well Here If...
 



 \\- You learn by doing — you'd rather build a rough version than read documentation for a week
 



 \\- You're excited about AI and already spend personal time experimenting with new tools and models
 



 \\- You're not afraid to ask questions, but you also try to figure things out yourself first
 



 \\- You care about shipping working software, not just writing clever code
 



 \\- You communicate clearly — you say what's working, what's stuck, and what you need
 



 \\- You want to grow into a strong AI engineer and are looking for a team that will push you

description:
IMEA (India, Middle East, Africa)

**Title**
 Data Engineer
   

  

**Job Description**
 A Data Engineer is responsible for designing, building, and maintaining large\\-scale data systems and infrastructure. Their primary goal is to ensure that data is properly collected, stored, processed, and retrieved to support business intelligence, analytics, and data\\-driven decision\\-making.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Design and Develop Data Pipelines: Create data pipelines to extract data from various sources, transform it into a standardized format, and load it into a centralized data repository.
* Build and Maintain Data Infrastructure: Design, implement, and manage data warehouses, data lakes, and other data storage solutions.
* Ensure Data Quality and Integrity: Develop data validation, cleansing, and normalization processes to ensure data accuracy and consistency.
* Collaborate with Data Analysts and Business Process Owners: Work with data analysts and business process owners to understand their data requirements and provide data support for their projects.
* Optimize Data Systems for Performance: Continuously monitor and optimize data systems for performance, scalability, and reliability.
* Develop and Maintain Data Governance Policies: Create and enforce data governance policies to ensure data security, compliance, and regulatory requirements.


**Experience \\& Skills**
* Hands\\-on experience in implementing, supporting, and administering modern cloud\\-based data solutions (Google BigQuery, AWS Redshift, Azure Synapse, Snowflake, etc.).
* Strong programming skills in SQL, Java, and Python.
* Experience in configuring and managing data pipelines using Apache Airflow, Informatica, Talend, SAP BODS or API\\-based extraction.
* Expertise in real\\-time data processing frameworks.
* Strong understanding of Git and CI/CD for automated deployment and version control.
* Experience with Infrastructure\\-as\\-Code tools like Terraform for cloud resource management.
* Good stakeholder management skills to collaborate effectively across teams.
* Solid understanding of SAP ERP data and processes to integrate enterprise data sources.
* Exposure to data visualization and front\\-end tools (Tableau, Looker, etc.).
* Strong command of English with excellent communication skills.

title: Senior Staff Software Engineer - Full Stack
description:
Organizations everywhere struggle under the crushing costs and complexities of “solutions” that promise to simplify their lives. To create a better experience for their customers and employees. To help them grow. Software is a choice that can make or break a business. Create better or worse experiences. Propel or throttle growth. Business software has become a blocker instead of ways to get work done.
   

  

  

  

**There’s another option. Freshworks With a fresh vision for how the world works.**
  

  

  

 At Freshworks, we build uncomplicated service software that delivers exceptional customer and employee experiences. Our enterprise\\-grade solutions are powerful, yet easy to use, and quick to deliver results. Our people\\-first approach to AI eliminates friction, making employees more effective and organizations more productive. Over 72,000 companies, including Bridgestone, New Balance, Nucor, S\\&P Global, and Sony Music, trust Freshworks customer experience (CX) and employee experience (EX) software to fuel customer loyalty and service efficiency. And, over 4,500 Freshworks employees make this possible, all around the world.
   

  

  

  

***Fresh vision. Real impact. Come build it with us.***



**Job Description**

**Overview of the Role**




 At Freshworks, we don’t just ship software—we shape it to be fast, reliable, and refreshingly simple. As a Senior Staff Full Stack Engineer, you are a technical visionary and architectural leader for the broader engineering organization. You operate at the intersection of long\\-term business strategy and deep technical execution, driving the evolution of our most critical distributed systems and web architectures.
   

  





 If you thrive in solving extreme architectural complexity, possess exceptional product sense, and find your true north in defining tech strategy and driving org\\-wide engineering excellence—you belong here.
   

  





**The Impact You Will Create**



* **Organizational Architecture Visionary:** 
 You will define and execute the technical roadmap for highly complex, multi\\-domain systems, dictating how highly distributed microservices interact with next\\-generation enterprise frontend platforms.
* **Strategic Business Alignment:** 
 You will not just build features; you will partner with senior product leadership to translate multi\\-year business objectives and market ambiguities into scalable, future\\-proof technical strategies.
* **Org\\-Wide Force Multiplier:** 
 You will raise the talent bar across multiple domains by defining engineering standards, mentoring Staff and Lead engineers, and proactively designing out systemic bottlenecks before they materialize.



**Roles \\& Responsibilities**



* **Org\\-Wide System Design (HLD \\& LLD):** 
 Architect highly resilient, cross\\-domain systems. Drive the technical vision for API governance, advanced database modeling (sharding, partitioning), and asynchronous event\\-driven architectures designed for massive scale and multi\\-region high availability.
* **Advanced Frontend Architecture:** 
 Set the North Star for UI architecture across the organization. Pioneer micro\\-frontend strategies, complex global state management, and advanced rendering paradigms (CSR/SSR/SSG) to achieve world\\-class Core Web Vitals at an enterprise scale.
* **End\\-to\\-End Platform Engineering:** 
 Architect scalable full\\-stack platforms, ensuring highly optimized, secure, and low\\-latency data flow from complex backend topologies to the end\\-user interface.
* **Observability \\& Reliability:** 
 Define org\\-wide SLIs and SLOs. Architect comprehensive telemetry and monitoring ecosystems, and lead incident response and post\\-mortems for critical, high\\-impact system outages.
* **Executive Cross\\-Functional Leadership:** 
 Act as a technical authority who influences VP and C\\-level decisions. Collaborate deeply with Product, Design, and Engineering leadership to align technical investments with business ROI.


**Qualifications**

**Qualifications**



* **Experience:** 
 12\\+ years of software engineering experience, with a proven track record of operating successfully at a Senior Staff, Principal, or equivalent level within a high\\-growth, massive\\-scale SaaS or enterprise environment.
* **Master Problem Solver:** 
 An expert\\-level foundation in Data Structures, Algorithms, and System Design, with the demonstrated ability to simplify extreme architectural complexity into elegant, maintainable solutions.



**Core Skills \\& Technical Mastery**



* **Global Web \\& UI Architecture:** 
 Deep, authoritative command of modern frontend ecosystems (React/Angular/Vue, TS/JS). Proven experience building design\\-system\\-aware development cultures, ensuring strict UI accessibility (WCAG), and enforcing robust frontend security protocols.
* **Distributed Systems at Scale:** 
 Proven experience architecting asynchronous, distributed applications. Mastery of SOLID principles, advanced design patterns, and building for strict fault tolerance and data consistency.
* **Backend \\& API Mastery:** 
 Deep expertise in designing robust API contracts, complex relational and NoSQL database modeling, and optimizing backend logic for latency, throughput, and extensibility.
* **DevOps \\& Infrastructure:** 
 Strong hands\\-on experience guiding infrastructure\\-as\\-code, CI/CD pipeline optimization, and cloud\\-native deployment strategies (AWS/GCP/Azure).
* **Executive Product Sense:** 
 The ability to look beyond the code to understand the underlying market mechanics, seamlessly translating highly ambiguous business requirements into concrete, extensible engineering architectures.


**Additional Information**

 At Freshworks, we have fostered an environment that enables everyone to find their true potential, purpose, and passion, welcoming colleagues of all backgrounds, genders, sexual orientations, religions, and ethnicities. We are committed to providing equal opportunity and believe that diversity in the workplace creates a more vibrant, richer environment that boosts the goals of our employees, communities, and business.
 **Fresh vision. Real impact. Come build it with us.**
